violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Hood system not adequate for 4 Fusion fryers. Flat-grill not located under hood in back prep kitchen.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Prep table coolers need detail cleaning. Clean under cutting boards.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk in cooler floor needs cleaning.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
